description:
Resolve all defects found in the Deep Audit v2 for `hx-checkbox-group`.
Source: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-checkbox-group/AUDIT.md`

**Summary:** 13 defects ‚Äî 1 P0, 4 P1, 8 P2, 0 P3

### P0 ‚Äî Critical
- [ ] [P0] 01: Slotted error content is not reachable via `aria-describedby`

### P1 ‚Äî High
- [ ] [P1] 01: `role="alert"` combined with `aria-live="polite"` creates conflicting ARIA semantics
- [ ] [P1] 02: `required` state is not programmatically determinable on the `<fieldset>`
- [ ] [P1] 03: `_suppressNextChildChange` double-fire guard can silently swallow rapid legitimate events
- [ ] [P1] 04: `aria-describedby` always includes `_helpTextId` even when the help slot is empty

### P2 ‚Äî Medium
- [ ] [P2] 01-08: Multiple medium-priority issues including Math.random() IDs, querySelectorAll scope, pointer-events, validity anchor, missing tests, Storybook imports, no Drupal docs

Reference the AUDIT.md in the component directory for full details and code locations.
title: Audit Fix: hx-checkbox-group
